name: converge
description: Recurring task engine for Codex — schedule, poll, retry, and monitor work on intervals

interface.shortDescription: Recurring task scheduling for Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Converge lets Codex sessions run tasks on a schedule, poll until a condition is met, retry on failure, or monitor something over time. The Codex session owns execution — it claims due jobs, runs them inline, and submits results back to the daemon.
defaultPrompt: Run the test suite every 10 minutes until it passes.
Check if the PR is merged every 5 minutes for the next hour.
Watch for drift in the config file every 30 minutes.
